proof fn phi_3_pow2_negative_is_one(e: int)
    requires
        e < 0,

reason: `pow2` returns 1 for all negative exponents — mathematically 2^(-n) is a fraction, so callers passing negative exponents by mistake silently get 1

name: smallest_bin_huge_boundary
reason: The boundary between the computed bin path and BIN_HUGE is at wsize > 524288 (strict), so wsize == 524288 (size == 4194304) takes the complex computation path rather than mapping to BIN_HUGE — off-by-one could cause the largest non-huge size to get an incorrect bin index
